Item.name: Hlehlisa uKhetho kaninzi oluFakelweyo lwamva nje
Tsiba yangoku Yiya ku-Okulandelayo ukhetho oluninzi
Cacisa ukuFunda Kuphela kuwo onke amaxwebhu
Buyisela Konke Kuwo Onke Amaxwebhu Avuliweyo
Fumana Konke Kuwo Onke Amaxwebhu Avuliweyo
⤵ Kopisha ukusuka kuFumana ukuya endaweni yaKhe
Nyanzelisa umbala wangaphambili kuzo zonke izimbo
Nyanzelisa umbala ongasemva kuzo zonke izimbo
Nyanzelela ukhetho lwefonti kuzo zonke izimbo
Nyanzelisa ukhetho lobungakanani befonti kuzo zonke izimbo
Nyanzelela ukhetho olungqindilili kuzo zonke izimbo
Nyanzelela ukhetho olukekeleyo kuzo zonke izimbo
Nyanzelela ukhetho ngaphantsi kuzo zonke izimbo
Vula iqulathe isiqulathi seefayili kwi-Command Prompt
Khuphela Isiqendu Esinesitayile sazo Zonke Izimbo
Khuphela isicatshulwa esineSitayile seSimbo sokuFumana uphawu
Oku kuzakususa indlela emfutshane kulo myalelo
Fihla (sebenzisa i-Alt okanye iqhosha le-F10 ukuguqula)
Yenza imiyalelo yomgangatho wangoku wokusonga/ongatyhilwayo iguqulelwe
Khubaza inqaku eliphambili lokuskrola ngenxa yomba wephedi yokuchukumisa
Gcina ukhetho xa ucofa ekunene ngaphandle kokhetho
Faka umbala wesiko kumbhalo ongaphambili okhethiweyo
Faka iisetingi zembonakalo kwiC0, C1 Unicode EOL
Thintela uphawu lolawulo (ikhowudi ye-C0) ukuchwetheza kuxwebhu
Soloko uvula uxwebhu olutsha ukongeza ekuqaleni
Sebenzisa umgca wokuqala woxwebhu njengegama lesithuba esingenasihloko
Vula zonke iifayile zolawulo endaweni yokundulula isiqulathi seefayili njengeNdawo yokusebenzela kulawulo oluwisayo
Nceda uphume kwi-Nextpad++ kwaye uqalise kwakhona i-Nextpad++ kwimowudi yoMlawuli ukuze usebenzise eli nqaku.
I-backspace key unindents endaweni yokususa indawo enye
Okubhalwe ngasentla kwekhasi kunye nombhalo osemazantsi
Sebenzisa ifonti enesithuba esinye kwincoko yababini yokuFumana (Kufuneka uqalise kwakhona iNextpad++)
Fumana incoko yababini ihlala ivuliwe emva kophendlo oluvelisa iziphumo zefestile
Qinisekisa Faka Indawo Kwawo Kuwo Onke Amaxwebhu Avuliweyo
Faka endaweni: Sukushukuma uye kwesi sehlo silandelayo
Ifestile yeziphumo zoPhendlo: bonisa kuphela ungeno olunye kwilayini efunyenweyo ukuba kuyenzeka
Khetha Igama Ngaphantsi Kwekharethi xa Ingakhethwanga Nto
Gcwalisa i-Find in Files Directory Field esekelwe kuXwebhu oluSebenzayo
: Ubuninzi beempawu zokuzalisa ngokuzenzekelayo iNdawo yokuFumana kuKhetho
Yenza i-snapshot yeseshoni kunye ne-backup yamaxesha ngamaxesha
Qalisa ugcino kulungiso kuyo yonke into
Vula iseshoni kumzekelo omtsha (kwaye ugcine iseshoni ngokuzenzekelayo xa uphuma)
* Uhlengahlengiso lwesi setingi kufuneka luqale kwakhona i-Nextpad++
Ukubuyisela umva ulungelelwaniso lwexesha lomhla (iifomati ezinde ezimfutshane)
Khumbula indawo yolawulo (iphaneli ivuliwe) kwezinye iimeko (imowudi yemizekelo emininzi) okanye xa usebenzisa iparamitha yomgca womyalelo [-nosession]
Iisetingi zokhetho lweDelimiter (Ctrl + Mouse cofa kabini)
Sebenzisa uluhlu lwamagama ahlala lukhona njengoko lunjalo
Yongeza umlinganiswa wakho njengenxalenye yegama (musa ukuyikhetha ngaphandle kokuba uyayazi into oyenzayo)
Nika amandla uMthintelo weFayile enkulu (akukho kuphawulwa kwesivakalisi)
Cwangcisa indlela yakho yendawo yelifu apha:
Bonisa kuphela igama lefayile kwibar yewonga
Yenza ukuba Gcina Konke qinisekisa ingxoxo

Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukugcina onke amaxwebhu alungisiweyo?
Khetha "Soloko ewe" ukuba awufuni ukubona le ncoko yababini kwakhona. Unokwenza kwakhona le ncoko yababini kwiiZikhethwa kamva.
Khuphela ulwazi lolungiso lweempazamo kwibhodi eqhotyoshwayo
Akukho git repository\nSebenzisa iBhrawuza ukuvula irepo.
Rekhoda imacro kuqala usebenzisa Qala uRekhoda.
Bonisa umendo opheleleyo wefayile kwibar yewonga
Qala ngokutsha usetyenziso ukuze ulayishe iiplagi ezifakiweyo.
Fumana kwiiProjekthi: Awukaqhagamshelwa kuluhlu lwefayile yeProjekthi yeProjekthi.
Khumbula ukubonakala kwephaneli kuzo zonke iiseshini
Qinisekisa Faka Indawo Yonke kumaxwebhu avuliweyo
Faka endaweni: sukushukuma uye kwisehlo esilandelayo
Sebenzisa ifonti enesithuba esinye kwi-Fumana ingxoxo
Khetha ifayile yeXML yomxholo weNextpad++ oza kuyisebenzisa
Amaxabiso oluhlu kufuneka abe ngu-0-255 kwaye isiqalo kufuneka sibe <= ekupheleni.
Phinda uqalise iNextpad++ ukuze uvelise kwakhona umongo ongagqibekanga weMenu.xml.
Ifayile inotshintsho olungagcinwanga.Ukulayishwa kwakhona ngekhowudi entsha kuya kuzilahla.Qhubeka?
Tsiba i-amp yangoku;Yiya ku Okulandelayo Ukukhetha okuninzi

ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.title: IMenu yokuhlela umxholo
ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.message: Ukuhlela umongo weMenu.xml ikuvumela ukuba uguqule iNotepad yakho++ kwimenyu yemenu yepopup. Kufuneka uqalise kwakhona i-Nextpad++ yakho ukuze isebenze emva kokuguqula umongo weMenu.xml.

SaveCurrentModifWarning.title: Gcina Uhlengahlengiso Lwangoku
SaveCurrentModifWarning.message:
Kufuneka ugcine ulungiso lwangoku. Lonke ulungiso olugciniweyo alunakuphinda lungenziwa.
Qhubeka?

LoseUndoAbilityWarning.title: Lahla uBuyiselo seSilumkiso
LoseUndoAbilityWarning.message:
Kufuneka ugcine ulungiso lwangoku. Lonke ulungiso olugciniweyo alunakuphinda lungenziwa.
Qhubeka?

CannotMoveDoc.title: Hambisa kwiNotepad entsha++ Instance
CannotMoveDoc.message: Uxwebhu lulungisiwe, lugcine uze uzame kwakhona.

DocReloadWarning.title: Layisha kwakhona
DocReloadWarning.message: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukulayisha kwakhona ifayile yangoku kwaye ulahlekelwe lutshintsho olwenziwe kwiNextpad++?

FileLockedWarning.title: Ukugcina akuphumelelanga
FileLockedWarning.message: Nceda khangela ukuba ingaba le fayile ivuliwe kwenye inkqubo

RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.title: Ukuthiya ngokutsha akuphumelelanga
RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.message: Igama elichaziweyo sele lisetyenziswa kwenye indawo.

RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.title: Ukuthiya ngokutsha akuphumelelanga
RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.message: Igama elikhankanyiweyo alinakuba nanto, okanye alinakuqulatha kuphela isithuba okanye ii-TAB(ii).

NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.title: Isixa seefayili ekufuneka zivulwe sikhulu kakhulu
NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.message: $INT_REPLACE$ files are about to be opened. Are you sure you want to open them?

SettingsOnCloudError.title: Izicwangciso kwifu
SettingsOnCloudError.message: Kubonakala ngathi umendo wezicwangciso kwilifu umiselwe kwi-drive yokufunda kuphela, okanye kwisiqulathi seefayili esifuna amalungelo awodwa ukuze ubhale ufikelelo. Useto lwakho efini luya kurhoxiswa.Nceda phinda umisele ixabiso elihambelanayo usebenzisa incoko yababini Ekhethwayo.

DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.title: Isenzo esingasebenziyo
DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.message: Ungalahla kuphela iifayile okanye iifolda kodwa hayi zombini, kuba ulahla isiqulathi seefayili njengemo yeProjekthi. Kufuneka wenze "Vula zonke iifayile zefolda endaweni yokundulula isiqulathi seefayili njengeNdawo yokuSebenza kulawulo olulahliweyo" kwicandelo elithi "Uluhlu oluMiselweyo" lencoko yababini Ezikhethwayo ukwenza lo msebenzi usebenze.

SortingError.title: Imposiso yokuhlela
SortingError.message: Akukwazeki ukwenza ukhetho lwamanani ngenxa yomgca $INT_REPLACE$.

ColumnModeTip.title: Ingcebiso yeNdlela yeKholamu
ColumnModeTip.message:
Kukho iindlela ezi-3 zokutshintshela kwimowudi yokukhetha ikholamu:
1. (Ikhibhodi kunye neMouse) Bamba i-Alt ngelixa ucofa-ekhohlo utsala
2. (Ikhibhodi kuphela) Bamba i-Alt+Shift ngelixa usebenzisa izitshixo zotolo
3. (Ikhibhodi okanye iMouse) Beka i-caret kwindawo oyifunayo kwindawo yebhloko yekholomu, emva koko phumeza "Qalisa/Phelisa Khetha kwiNdlela yeKholam" umyalelo; Hambisa icaret kwisiphelo esifunwayo sendawo yebhloko yekholamu, emva koko phumeza "Qalisa/Phelisa Khetha kwiNdlela yeKholam" umyalelo kwakhona

DoCloseOrNot.title: Gcina ifayile engekhoyo
DoCloseOrNot.message: Ifayile "$STR_REPLACE$" ayisekho. Gcina le fayile kumhleli?

DoDeleteOrNot.title: Cima ifayile
DoDeleteOrNot.message: Ifayile "$STR_REPLACE$" izakusiwa kuRecycle Bin kwaye olu xwebhu luya kuvalwa. Qhubeka?

NoBackupDoSaveFile.title: Gcina
NoBackupDoSaveFile.message: Ifayile yakho yogcino ayifumaneki (icinyiwe ngaphandle). Yigcine kungenjalo idatha yakho iya kulahleka Uyafuna ukugcina ifayile "$STR_REPLACE$" ?

DoReloadOrNot.title: Layisha kwakhona
DoReloadOrNot.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Le fayile iye yalungiswa yenye inkqubo. Ngaba uyafuna ukuyilayisha kwakhona?

DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.title: Layisha kwakhona
DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Le fayile iye yalungiswa yenye inkqubo. Ngaba uyafuna ukuyilayisha kwakhona kwaye ulahlekelwe lutshintsho olwenziwe kwiNextpad++?

PrehistoricSystemDetected.title: Inkqubo yembali yangaphambili ichongiwe
PrehistoricSystemDetected.message: Kubonakala ngathi usasebenzisa inkqubo yangaphambili.Olu phawu lusebenza kuphela kwinkqubo yangoku, uxolo.

XpUpdaterProblem.title: Nextpad++ Updater
XpUpdaterProblem.message: Uhlaziyo lweNextpad++ aluhambelani neXP ngenxa yomaleko wokhuseleko ophelelwe lixesha phantsi kweXP. Ngaba uyafuna ukuya kwiphepha le-Nextpad++ ukukhuphela inguqulelo yamva nje?

GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.title: Imimiselo Yommeleli
GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.message: Nceda uqalise kwakhona i-Nextpad++ kwimowudi yoLawulo ukumisela ummeli.

DocTooDirtyToMonitor.title: Ingxaki yokubeka iliso
DocTooDirtyToMonitor.message: Uxwebhu lumdaka.Nceda ugcine uhlengahlengiso phambi kokulubeka esweni.

DocNoExistToMonitor.title: Ingxaki yokubeka iliso
DocNoExistToMonitor.message: Ifayile kufuneka ibekhona ukuze ibekwe iliso.

FileTooBigToOpen.title: Ingxaki yobungakanani befayile
FileTooBigToOpen.message: Ifayile inkulu kakhulu ukuba ingavulwa yiNextpad++

WantToOpenHugeFile.title: Ivula isilumkiso sefayile enkulu
WantToOpenHugeFile.message: Ukuvula ifayile enkulu ye-2GB+ kunokuthatha imizuzu emininzi. Uyafuna ukuyivula?

FileBackupFailed.title: Ugcino Lwefayile Aluphumelelanga
FileBackupFailed.message:
Uguqulelo lwangaphambili lwefayile alukwazanga kugcinwa kuluhlu logcino kwi "$STR_REPLACE$".
Ngaba uyafuna ukugcina ifayile yangoku?

LoadLangsFailed.title: Umqwalaseli
LoadLangsFailed.message: Layisha langs.xml ayiphumelelanga! Ngaba uyafuna ukubuyisela i-langs.xml yakho?

FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.title: Isiqulathi seefayili njengeNdawo yokusebenzela yongeza ingxaki yesiqulathi seefayili
FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.message: Isiqulathi seefayili esisezantsi sencwadi ofuna ukuyongeza ikhona. Nceda susa ingcambu yayo kwiqela lenjongo ngaphambi kokuba wongeze incwadi eneenkcukacha "$STR_REPLACE$".

ProjectPanelSaveError.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelSaveError.message: Kwenzeke imposiso xa ubhala ifayile yendawo yokusebenza. Indawo yakho yokusebenza ayigcinwanga.

ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Vula Indawo Yokusebenzela
ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Indawo yokusebenza yangoku ilungisiwe.Ngaba uyafuna ukugcina iprojekthi yangoku?

ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Indawo Entsha Yokusebenzela
ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Indawo yokusebenza yangoku ilungisiwe.Ngaba uyafuna ukugcina iprojekthi yangoku?

ProjectPanelOpenFailed.title: Vula Indawo Yokusebenzela
ProjectPanelOpenFailed.message: Indawo yokusebenza ayikwazanga kuvulwa. Kubonakala ngathi ifayile yokuvula ayiyofayile yeprojekthi esebenzayo.

ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.title: Susa isiqulathi seefayili kwiprojekthi
ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.message: Zonke izinto ezincinci ziya kususwa. Uqinisekile ufuna ukususa le folda kwiprojekthi?

ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.title: Susa ifayile kwiprojekthi
ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.message: Uqinisekile ufuna ukususa le fayile kwiprojekthi?

ProjectPanelReloadDirty.title: Layisha kwakhona Indawo Yokusebenzela
ProjectPanelReloadDirty.message: Indawo yokusebenza yangoku ilungisiwe.Ukulayishwa kwakhona kuya kulahla zonke izilungiso. Uyafuna ukuqhubeka?

UDLNewNameError.title: Imposiso ye-UDL
UDLNewNameError.message: Eli gama lisetyenziswa kolunye ulwimi, ndicela unike enye.

UDL_saveBeforeImport.title: Ulwimi oluchazwa ngumsebenzisi
UDL_saveBeforeImport.message: Phambi kokuthumela ngaphandle, gcina inkcazelo yolwimi lwakho ngokucofa "Gcina Njenge..." iqhosha.

SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.title: Ingaba uqinisekile?
SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.message: Uqinisekile ufuna ukucima le ndlela imfutshane?

FindCharRangeValueError.title: Uluhlu lwengxaki yeXabiso
FindCharRangeValueError.message: Kufuneka uchwetheze phakathi kwe-0 kunye ne-255.

OpenInAdminMode.title: Ukugcina akuphumelelanga
OpenInAdminMode.message: Ifayile ayinakugcinwa kwaye inokukhuselwa. Ngaba uyafuna ukwazisa i-Nextpad++ kwimowudi yoMlawuli?

OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.title: Ukugcina akuphumelelanga
OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.message: Ifayile ayinakugcinwa kwaye inokukhuselwa. Ngaba uyafuna ukwazisa i-Nextpad++ kwimowudi yoMlawuli?

ExitToUpdatePlugins.title: I-Nextpad++ sele iza kuphuma
ExitToUpdatePlugins.message: Ukuba ucofa u-EWE, uya kuyeka i-Nextpad++ ukuze uqhubeke nokusebenza. I-Nextpad++ iya kuqaliswa kwakhona emva kokuba yonke imisebenzi iphelile. Qhubeka?

NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.title: I-Nextpad++ kufuneka iphinde iqaliswe
NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.message: Kuya kufuneka uqalise kwakhona i-Nextpad++ ukuze ulayishe iiplagi ozifakileyo.

ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.title: I-Nextpad++ kufuneka iphinde iqaliswe
ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.message: Kuya kufuneka uqalise kwakhona i-Nextpad++ ukwenza utshintsho lweMbali.

WindowsSessionExit.title: I-Nextpad++ - Phuma kwiseshoni yeWindows
WindowsSessionExit.message: Iseshoni yeWindows sele iza kupheliswa kodwa unedatha engagcinwanga.Ngaba uyafuna ukuphuma kwi-Nextpad++ ngoku?

LanguageMenuCompactWarning.title: Imenyu yoLwimi oluHlanganisiweyo
LanguageMenuCompactWarning.message: Olu khetho luya kutshintshwa kuphehlelelo olulandelayo.

SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.title: $STR_REPLACE$
SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.message: Utshintsho olungagcinwanga sele luza kuchithwa! Ngaba uyafuna ukugcina utshintsho lwakho phambi kokutshintsha imixholo?

MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.title: I-Macro kunye ne-Run Command Compatibility
MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.message:
Imiyalelo yakho ye-Macro kunye ne-Run egcinwe kwi-Notepad ++ v.8.5.2 (okanye ngaphezulu) ayinakuhambelani noguqulelo lwangoku lwe-Notepad ++. Nceda uvavanye loo miyalelo kwaye, ukuba kuyimfuneko, uyihlele kwakhona.
Kungenjalo, unako ukuhla kwi-Notepad ++ v8.5.2 kwaye ubuyisele idatha yakho yangaphambili. I-Nextpad++ iya kukhuphela i-"shortcuts.xml" yakho endala kwaye iyigcine njenge "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup". Ukuthiya ngokutsha "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup" -> "shortcuts.xml", imiyalelo yakho kufuneka ibuyiselwe kwaye isebenze ngokufanelekileyo.

FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.title: Ukugcina akuphumelelanga
FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.message: Ayinakugcina ifayile. I-Nextpad++ egcweleyo egcina indlela eyalelweyo yokufunda kuphela ithintele ukuba ifayile ingagcinwa.

NotEnoughRoom4Saving.title: Ukugcina akuphumelelanga
NotEnoughRoom4Saving.message: Ayiphumelelanga ukugcina ifayile. Kubonakala ngathi akukho ndawo yaneleyo kwidiski yokugcina ifayile.Ifayile yakho ayigcinwanga.

FileInaccessibleUserSession.title: Ifayile ayifikeleleki
FileInaccessibleUserSession.message:
Ezinye iifayile kwiseshoni yakho egcinwe ngesandla "$STR_REPLACE$" ayifikeleleki.Anokuvulwa njengamaxwebhu angenanto kunye namaxwebhu okufunda kuphela njengezibambi-ndawo.
Ngaba ungathanda ukwenza ezo zibambi-ndawo?
QAPHELA: Ukukhetha ukungenzi izibambi-ndawo okanye ukuzivala kamva, iseshoni yakho egcinwe ngesandla AYISAYI kulungiswa xa uphuma.

FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.title: Ifayile ayifikeleleki
FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.message:
Ezinye iifayile kwiseshoni yakho yangaphambili azifikeleleki.Anokuvulwa njengamaxwebhu angenanto kunye namaxwebhu okufunda kuphela njengezibambi-ndawo.
Ngaba ungathanda ukwenza ezo zibambi-ndawo?
QAPHELA: Ukukhetha ukungenzi izibambi-ndawo okanye ukuzivala kamva, iseshoni yakho IYA KULUNGISWA XA UPHUMA!Sicebisa ukuba wenze i-backup "session.xml" yakho ngoku.

RTLvsDirectWrite.title: Ayinakuqhuba i-RTL
RTLvsDirectWrite.message: I-RTL ayihambelani nemowudi ye-DirectWrite.Nceda ucime imowudi ye-DirectWrite kwi-MISC.icandelo lencoko yababini Ezikhethwayo, kwaye uqale kwakhona i-Nextpad++.

FileMemoryAllocationFailed.title: NONE
FileMemoryAllocationFailed.message: Mhlawumbi akukho nkumbulo yaneleyo ekhululekileyo yefayile elayishwa yiNextpad++.

FindRegexBackwardDisabled.title: Uphendlo lwasemva lweRegex luvaliwe
FindRegexBackwardDisabled.message:
Ngokungagqibekanga, uphendlo lwangasemva lweregex luvaliwe ngenxa yeziphumo ezinokubakhona ebezingalindelekanga.Ukwenza uphendlo lwasemva, vula iFumana ingxoxo kwaye ukhethe imo yokukhangela eqhelekileyo okanye eyandisiweyo endaweni yokubonakalisa rhoqo. Cofa iqhosha elithi Kulungile ukuvula i Fumana ingxoxo okanye usete ingqwalasela kuyo.
Ukuba ufuna umsebenzi wokukhangela we-regex ongasemva, jonga incwadi yomsebenzisi ngemiyalelo yokuyenza isebenze.

FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.title: Khangela isilumkiso
FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.message: Imeko yebhokisi yokukhangela "Kukukhetha" iguqulwe ngokuzenzekela. Nceda uqinisekise imeko yokukhangela phambi kokuba wenze isenzo.

Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.title: I-Nextpad++ kufuneka iqalwe kwakhona
Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.message: I-Nextpad++ idinga ukuqaliswa kwakhona ukubonisa iindlela ezimfutshane zemenyu ekunene.

NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.title: Ukutshintsha uphawu lwefayile efundwayo kuphela akuphumelelanga
NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.message: Nceda usebenzise i-Nextpad++ njengomlawuli ukuze utshintshe iimpawu zefayile.

SelectFolderFromBrowserString.name: Khetha isiqulathi seefayili onokuthi usifake kwisiqulathi seefayili njengenjongo yokusebenzela kwindawo yokusebenzela

word-chars-list-tip.value: Oku kukuvumela ukuba uquke unobumba owongezelelekileyo koolinganiswa begama langoku ngelixa ucofa kabini ukhetho okanye uphendla ngo "Tshatisa igama elipheleleyo kuphela" ukhetho olukhangelweyo.

eol-custom-color-tip.value: Yiya kuMququzeleli weSimbo ukutshintsha umbala wesiko we-EOL ongagqibekanga ("umbala wesiko we-EOL")..

cloud-restart-warning.value: Nceda uqalise kwakhona i-Nextpad++ ukuze isebenze.

cloud-select-folder.value: Khetha ifolda ukusuka/ukuya apho iNextpad++ ifunda/ibhala khona izicwangciso zayo

find-in-files-filter-tip.value:
Fumana kwi-cpp, cxx, h, hxx hpp: *.cpp *.cxx *.h *.hxx *.hpp
Fumana kuzo zonke iifayile ngaphandle kwe-exe, log obj: *.* !*.exe !*.obj !*.log
Fumana kuzo zonke iifayile kodwa ungabandakanyi iimvavanyo zeefolda, bin bin64: *.* !\uvavanyo !\bin*
Fumana kuzo zonke iifayile kodwa ungabandakanyi zonke iifolda zelogi okanye iilogi ngokuphindaphindiweyo: *.* !+\log*

find-in-files-dir-from-active-doc-tip.value: Gcwalisa indawo kavimba weefayili ngokusekelwe kuxwebhu olusebenzayo

find-status-top-reached.value: Fumana: Uxwebhu olufikelelwe ekuqaleni, ukwenzeka kokuqala ukusuka ezantsi kufunyenwe.

find-status-end-reached.value: Fumana: Kufikelelwe kwisiphelo soxwebhu, ukwenzeka kokuqala ukusuka phezulu kufunyenwe.

find-status-replaceinfiles-1-replaced.value: Faka enye indawo kwiiFayile: isenzeko esi-1 siye satshintshwa

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-1-repla.value: Faka enye indawo kwiiFayile ezivuliweyo: isenzeko esi-1 siye satshintshwa

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-nb-repl.value: Faka endaweni yeeFayile ezivuliweyo: $INT_REPLACE$ izehlo zitshintshwe

find-status-replaceall-readonly.value: Buyisela Konke: Akunakutshintsha okubhaliweyo.Uxwebhu lwangoku lufundwa kuphela

find-status-replace-end-reached.value: Faka endaweni: Kufikelelwe ekupheleni koxwebhu, kuqalwe ukusuka phezulu.

find-status-replace-top-reached.value: Faka endaweni: Uxwebhu olufikelelwe ekuqaleni, luqalwe ukusuka ezantsi.

find-status-replaced-next-found.value: Buyisela: Isehlo esi-1 satshintshwa.Isehlo esilandelayo sifunyenwe.

find-status-replaced-next-not-found.value: Buyisela: Isehlo esi-1 satshintshwa.Akukho zehlo zifunyenweyo.

find-status-replace-readonly.value: Buyisela: Ayinakubuyisela umbhalo.Uxwebhu lwangoku lufundwa kuphela

find-status-cannot-find-pebkac-maybe.value: Isehlo esinikiweyo asifumaneki.Usenokuba ulibele ukujonga u-"Songa" (ukuya KUVULA), "Tshatisa imeko" (ukuya KUVALIWE), okanye "Tshatisa igama elipheleleyo kuphela" (ukuya KUVALIWE).

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat.value: Oonobumba abangabonakaliyo kuncamathelisiwe "Fumana ntoni" okanye "Buyisela ngomxholo"

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat-tip.value: Isilumkiso: Abalinganiswa abangabonakaliyo kumhlaba wokukhangela (okanye endaweni yawo). Okubhaliweyo kuncanyathiselwe kulo mmandla kubandakanya okungabonakaliyo (mhlawumbi umgca-isiphelo) abasebenzi.Ukuba uqhubeka ngaphandle kokucima, ziya kufakwa kuphendlo (okanye endaweni) okubhaliweyo.

replace-in-files-confirm-directory.value: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukubuyisela zonke izehlo kwi:

replace-in-projects-confirm-message.value: Ngaba ufuna ukubuyisela zonke izenzeko kuwo onke amaxwebhu kwiPaneli yeProjekthi ekhethiweyo (i)?

replace-in-open-docs-confirm-message.value: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukubuyisela zonke izinto ezenzekayo kuwo onke amaxwebhu avuliweyo?

find-result-title-info-extra.value: - Indlela yesihluzo somgca: bonisa kuphela iziphumo ezihluziweyo

IncrementalFind-FSTopReached.value: Kufikelelwe phezulu kwephepha, kuqhubeka ukusuka ezantsi

IncrementalFind-FSEndReached.value: Kufikelelwe ekupheleni kwephepha, kuqhubeka ukusuka phezulu

largeFileRestriction-tip.value:
Ezinye iifitsha zinokucotha ukusebenza kwiifayile ezinkulu.Ezi mpawu zinokucinywa ngokuzenzekelayo ekuvuleni ifayile enkulu.Unokuzilungelelanisa apha.
QAPHELA: 1. Ukuguqula iinketho apha kufuna ukuphinda kuvulwe ngoku kuvulwe iifayile ezinkulu ukufumana impatho eyiyo.
2. Ukuba u-"Deactivate Word Wrap global" itshekishwa kwaye uvula ifayile enkulu, "I-Word Wrap" iya kucinywa kuzo zonke iifayili.Ungayivula kwakhona ngokusebenzisa imenyu "Jonga-> Ukusonga ngeLizwi".

npcNote-tip.value:
Ukubonakaliswa kweendawo ezimhlophe ezikhethiweyo "ezingezona ze-ASCII" kunye nezingashicileli (ukulawula).
QAPHELA: Ukusebenzisa umboniso kuya kuvala iziphumo zoonobumba kumbhalo.
Kuluhlu olupheleleyo lwesithuba esimhlophe esikhethiweyo kunye namagama angashicilelo khangela Incwadi Yomsebenzisi.
Cofa kweli qhosha ukuvula iwebhusayithi ngeNcwadi yoMsebenzisi.

npcAbbreviation-tip.value:
Ushunqulelo : igama I-NBSP : akukho ndawo yokuphumla ZWSP : indawo enobubanzi obuziro ZWNBSP : isithuba sobubanzi obungu-zero akukho-break
Kuluhlu olupheleleyo khangela Incwadi yoMsebenzisi. Cofa ku "?"iqhosha ekunene ukuvula iwebhusayithi ngeNcwadi yoMsebenzisi.

npcCodepoint-tip.value:
Codepoint : igama U+00A0 : akukho ndawo yokuphumla U+200B : indawo enobubanzi obuziro U+FEFF : isithuba sobubanzi beqanda akukho ndawo yokuphumla
Kuluhlu olupheleleyo khangela Incwadi yoMsebenzisi. Cofa ku "?"iqhosha ekunene ukuvula iwebhusayithi ngeNcwadi yoMsebenzisi.

npcCustomColor-tip.value: Yiya kuMququzeleli weSimbo ukutshintsha umbala wesiko omiselweyo kwindawo emhlophe ekhethiweyo kunye namagama angashicileliyo ("Amagama angengashicileli umbala wesiko").

npcIncludeCcUniEol-tip.value: Faka iisetingi zembonakalo yoonobumba abangashicilelwanga kwi-C0, ulawulo lwe-C1 kunye ne-Unicode EOL (umgca olandelayo, isahluli somgca kunye nesahluli somhlathi) abalinganiswa.

searchingInSelThresh-tip.value: Ubuncinane benani labalinganiswa abakhethiweyo kwindawo yokuhlela ukujonga ngokuzenzekelayo "Kukukhetha" ibhokisi yokukhangela xa iFumana ingxoxo ivuliwe.Elona xabiso liphezulu yi-$INT_REPLACE$.Cwangcisa ixabiso ku-0 ukuvala ukukhangela okuzenzekelayo.

searchingFillFindWhat-tip.value: Elona nani liphezulu loonobumba abakhethiweyo kwizowuni yokuhlela ukuzalisa ngokuzenzekelayo indawo ethi "Fumana ntoni" xa i-Ctrl-F isenziwa.Elona xabiso liphezulu yi-$INT_REPLACE$, elona xabiso liphezulu lika "Fumana ntoni" indawo, elinganiselwe yinkqubo.

verticalEdge-tip.value: Yongeza isiphawuli sekholamu yakho ngokubonisa indawo yaso ngenani lokugqibela.Ungachaza iziphawuli ezininzi zekholamu ngokusebenzisa isithuba esimhlophe ukwahlula amanani ahlukeneyo.

fileSaveAsCopySaveButton-tip.value: Bamba uShift ngelixa ucofa Gcina ukuze uvule ikopi emva kokugcina.

autoIndentBasic-tip.value: Qinisekisa ukuba ukujongwa komgca wangoku (okt umgca omtsha owenziwe ngokucinezela iqhosha le-ENTER) uhambelana nokuhlehliswa komgca wangaphambili.

autoIndentAdvanced-tip.value:
Yenza i-indentation isebenze "efana no-C" kwiilwimi kunye nePython.Iilwimi "ezifana no-C" ziquka: C, C ++, Java, C #, Objective-C, PHP, JavaScript, JSP, CSS, Perl, Rust, PowerShell kunye neJSON.
Ukuba ukhetha imowudi eqhubela phambili kodwa ungahleli iifayile kwezi lwimi zikhankanyiweyo ngasentla, uhleko-hlengiso luya kuhlala lukwimo esisiseko.

global-override-tip.value: Ukuvumela "i-Global override" apha iyakugqitha loo parameter kuzo zonke izimbo zolwimi.Eyona nto uyifunayo ngenene kukusebenzisa "iSimbo esiMiselweyo" endaweni yoko

scintillaRenderingTechnology-tip.value: Unokuphucula unikezelo loonobumba abakhethekileyo okanye asombulule imiba ethile yemizobo, qala kwakhona i-Nextpad++ ukuze usebenzise utshintsho.

toolbar-accent-tip.value: Olu khetho lwenza ukuba ii-iyikhoni zakho zebar yesixhobo zilandele umbala we-accent yenkqubo yeWindows.Umbala wonyuso ngumbala ogqamileyo osetyenziswa kumaqhosha, imida, kunye neQalisa imenyu yeethayile kwiWindows.Ukuyitshintsha, yiya ku Useto> Ukwenza okuthandwa nguwe> Imibala, emva koko ukhethe umbala owuthandayo wesinyanzeliso.

len-limit-exceeded-tip.value: Ubude bomda bugqithisiwe: Igalelo lakho lingadlula umda ovunyelweyo kwaye linokunqunyulwa, kwaye aliyi kugcinelwa iseshoni elandelayo.

max-len-on-search-tip.value: Igalelo lakho lingagqitha kumda ovunyelweyo kwaye linokunqunyulwa, kwaye aliyi kugcinelwa iseshoni elandelayo.

max-len-on-save-tip.value: Ubude begalelo lakho lide kakhulu kwaye akunakugcinwa kwiseshoni yakho elandelayo.

tabbar-tabcompactlabellen-tip.value: Inciphisa ubude obubonakalayo bamagama ethebhu amade.Ngena ukuze usebenzise ixabiso elinikiweyo.Uluhlu lwexabiso: 1-257 abalinganiswa (0 ikhubaza i-truncation).
